595.name: gpt_skill_audit
595.defect: curator does not do quality assessment
595.solution: GPT scoring to low-score auto-archive/stale marking

596.name: self_capability_audit
596.defect: no self-discovery of what I can do
596.solution: three-end scanning to capability map to gap analysis

597.name: dual_skill_gene_evolve
597.solution: skill to gene to fitness to skill_update closed loop

598.name: gpt_subagent_depth_broker
598.defect: sub-session depth only 1 layer, complex tasks cannot be recursively decomposed
598.solution: GPT-managed depth broker: parent session only registers task contract; GPT responsible for task tree expansion, depth budget, result compression recovery; Hermes native does not need to break max_spawn_depth.

599.name: gpt_skill_merge_refactor
599.defect: does not merge related skills, skill library has duplication/conflict/search noise rising
599.solution: GPT-managed skill merge refactor: triggered by 595 quality audit low-score/duplicate signals; generate merge proposal per semantic cluster; preserve alias and migration log; human or GPT second review before merge.

600.name: gpt_value_aware_compression
600.defect: compression does not consider value, important evidence/constraints lost in equal-weight summarization
600.solution: GPT-managed value-aware compression: before compression, assign ValueScore=constraint/evidence/decision/path/failure lesson weights; high-value content preserves pointers, low-value content gets summarized.

607.name: apex_straTA_strategic_tiered_agent_architecture
607.formula: ApexStraTA = pi(z|s1) tensor pi(a_t|z,s_t) tensor GRPO(z,a_t) tensor MemLLM
607.description: Bee Queen activated swarm mode: single LLM instruction generates global strategy z, drives multi-agent parallel execution a_t, GRPO layered optimization, MemLLM long-term memory. Verified: 22 tests pass including full cycle, idempotent strategy, GRPO KL penalty, memory value lock.
607.shortboard: Bee Queen activated swarm mode: z~pi(s1) generates global strategy, fix z drives multi-Agent parallel a_t~pi(z,s_t), GRPO layered reward J(theta), MemLLM long-term memory sync, single instruction completes strategy+execution+memory+verification closed loop

608.name: issue_resolution_benchmark_gate

611.name: apex_iteration_budget
611.description: APEX iteration budget gate: budget-aware intervention measurement for agent iteration cut-off risk. G_apex_ib = 1 + 0.03*(1 - truncation_risk) - 0.02*truncation_risk. Intervention levels: Normal/Low/Medium/High/Critical. Standalone measurement gate — does NOT modify agent behavior.

verification.cargo_test: PASS (43 tests including 6 new iteration_budget tests)

613.name: apex_mem_hybrid_retrieval_rrf_gate
613.description: APEX-MEM style hybrid retrieval gate: fuses BM25, vector, and graph channel hits via weighted Reciprocal Rank Fusion; measures channel_coverage, overlap_rate, mean_channel_count, rrf_quality, keep_for_memory. Local/offline measurement gate; does not embed Tantivy/HNSW server dependencies.
